title: Daily Briefing — Tuesday, May 26
tldr: Play: generate on-brand mockups, icons, and social images with ChatGPT's image tool — and edit them in plain English. Concept art and asset drafts in minutes, no design suite.
The day's enterprise-platform and multimodal launches were news; the durable, run-it-today design move is below.

sections.h: Run it today: design assets from a sentence

blocks.p: Payoff: fast first-draft mockups, hero images, icons, and ad variations — with legible text in the image and transparent backgrounds on request — that you can hand off or polish.
blocks.doIt: In ChatGPT, ask for an image: A clean flat-style icon set for a budgeting app, 6 icons, consistent line weight, transparent background. To revise, just describe the change (make the palette warmer, add the headline FALL SALE) or select a region and edit only that part. Iterate, then download. How-to: OpenAI — Images in ChatGPT.
blocks.note: Spin up cheap variations for A/B options; always confirm you have rights to any referenced style before commercial use.
